Grade 4 — Week 6

Math Challenge Problems
📅 Due: Sunday night 🏆 6 problems · 1 point each
Problem 1

If you turn gear 2 in a clockwise direction, which of the following gears will also be turning clockwise? (Hint: when one gear turns clockwise, the gear that is touching it will turn counter-clockwise.)

Gear:
Problem 2

Charlotte buys 2 scrunchies and one headband at the hair accessory store. Each of the scrunchies costs $2. If Charlotte spends $10 in total (with no tax), how much does the headband cost?

My answer: dollars
Problem 3

Ellie has started to write some numbers in the table below. She decided that each row and each column will contain the numbers 1, 2 and 3 only once (like in Sudoku). What is the sum of the numbers in squares A and B?

My answer:
Problem 4

First Akira scores 12 points in total with three arrows. On her second turn she scores 15. How many points does she score on her third turn?

My answer: points
Problem 5

The space farmer has 30 space chickens and space rabbits altogether. There are 100 legs in total. How many space chickens does he have?

My answer: chickens
Problem 6

There are five students playing ball: Audrey, Mike, Esper, Rayan, and Athena. Here is some information about them:
• Audrey is older than Mike.
• Esper is younger than Athena, but older than Rayan.
• Rayan is older than Mike.
• Athena is younger than Audrey.
Who is the youngest?

Youngest:
